policy.compromise_response: rotate immediately; reject post-compromise evidence for compromised key_id
policy.historical_evidence: retain retired public keys so old evidence remains re-verifiable
policy.keyless_gate: keyless Fulcio/Rekor remains blocked until one external-team-pilot deployment records the required evidence for this runbook

production_gate.reason: local canary exists, but no external-team-pilot rotation evidence has been recorded

required_evidence.description: Named external-team-pilot deployment record with deployment_id, operator, team scope, start/end timestamps, and witnessd git SHA
Operator-key archive produced by the rotation procedure, including retired-to-current continuity and public key paths
Canary bundle emitted by the current key with source_kind operator-key-rotation-canary and verified by scripts/revalidate_key_rotation.py
Depone verification transcript for the production deployment bundle and canary bundle
Human operator review confirming the deployment was not local-only dogfood and that private keys were not committed or exposed
